versions.version_description: No capo in this version and added F#7 to the second line of the chorus. The verses all bounce between Bsus2 and E. Also added chord fingerings to top of song.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: No Capo, Half Step Down, sounds fine in standard as well.

content:
Hold My Hand Acoustic Chords by Hootie And The Blowfish

On the record it is in the key of B and for the best true
sound you should probably play it that way WITHOUT a capo.
You can put a capo on the second fret to stay in B or just
play it in A to be more vocal friendly.

Capo 2 (optional)

[Intro]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 4x


[Verse 1]

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
With a little love, and some tenderness[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
We'll walk upon the water[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
We'll rise above the mist[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
With a little peace, and some harmony[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
We'll take the world together[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
We'll take em by the hand[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I ve got a hand for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I wanna run with you[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab]([ch]D[/ch])  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
 Yes indeed, I saw you standing there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Your head was down, your eyes were red[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
No comb had touched your hair[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I said get up,  and let me see you smile[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
We'll take a walk together[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Walk the road awhile[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I ve got a hand for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I wanna run with you[/tab]

Won't you let me run with you?

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Want you to hold my hand
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

I'll take you to a place where you can be
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Anything you wanna be because
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
   I wanna love you the best that, the best that I can[/tab]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 4x

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You see I was wasted, and I was wasting time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Till I thought about your problems, I thought about your crimes[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Then I stood up, and then I screamed aloud[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be part of your problems[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Don't wanna be part of your crimes, no[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I ve got a hand for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause I wanna run with you[/tab]

Wont you let me run with you?

[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Want you to hold my hand
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

I'll take you to the promised land
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Maybe we can't change the world but
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
    I wanna love you the best that, the best that I can[/tab]

Solo section

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 4x
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Want you to hold my hand
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

I'll take you to a place where you can be
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Anything you wanna be because
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
   I...oh...no, no, no, no, no[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Want you to hold my hand
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

I'll take you to the promised land
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Hold my hand[/tab]

Maybe we can't change the world but
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
   I wanna love you the best that, the best that I can[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Oh,   the best that I can[/tab]

A D (repeat to fade out)
